title: WHAT:
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Perinatal mental health conditions are the most common complication of pregnancy and a leading cause of maternal death.
1 in 3 birthing people are affected by perinatal mental health conditions, yet 75% go untreated.
Perinatal depression is the leading cause of maternal mortality.
Black women are dying at three times the rate of Caucasian women due to maternal health issues.
California spends an estimated $2.4 billion annually on the consequences of untreated perinatal mental health conditions.
